reviews.comment:
Buen lugar, paramos a desayunar, lastima que no son Estación Full, por lo que no trabajan con la aplicación YPF, lo demás muy bueno

(Translated by Google)
Good place, we stopped for breakfast. It's a shame they're not a full-service station, so they don't work with the YPF app. Otherwise, very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3918729990868918457/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbHN1M1BBEAE

reviews.comment:
Estación YPF que siempre tiene nafta. Lo mejor son los sándwiches del shop. Caseros y hechos en el momento.

(Translated by Google)
YPF station that always has gasoline. The best are the sandwiches from the shop. Homemade and made at the moment.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3918729990868918457/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdXZXWHJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
No le puse 5 estrellas xq no funcionó la Serví Club ni de ida ni de vuelta..x el personal se portan muy bien y siempre que viajo x el  Norte paro a descansar en ese lugar

(Translated by Google)
I didn't give it 5 stars because the Service Club didn't work either way... however, the staff are very friendly and I always stop there to rest whenever I travel through the North.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3918729990868918457/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCd0tURUt3EAE

Excelente atención en todos....
Para la carga de gasoil. Los camiones deben ingresar de a unos por vez.....
Tiene un solo ingreso.
